description: This file is a shell script used for orchestrating and performing a smoke test of an API through a sequence of curl commands. It performs health checks, document creation, text attachment, starting an orchestration process, polling for build status, and fetching orchestration details.

methods.name: have_jq
methods.description: Checks if the 'jq' command-line JSON processor is available.

methods.name: require_cmd
methods.description: Ensures a specified command-line tool is available, exits otherwise.

methods.name: c
methods.description: Wrapper around curl for making HTTP requests with default options.

methods.name: json_get
methods.description: Extracts a JSON value from a JSON string using a jq expression, with a fallback to a minimal Python parser.
